message:
fix(core): propagate cancellation from attached native Cx in RaptorQ and WAL-FEC

The RaptorQ codec now checks the attached native Cx for cancellation
when deriving a request context, mirroring native cancel reasons to the
local Cx. The WAL FEC commit hook clears its buffer even after a failed
encode so stale pages do not leak into the next commit group. Adds tests
for both native-cancel propagation paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
